    A

    Application - Class in kp.processor

    B

    Box - Class in kp.model
    The Box class represents a container with numbers and a timestamp.
    Box() - Constructor for class kp.model.Box
    Default constructor.
    Box(int, long) - Constructor for class kp.model.Box
    Constructor with parameters.

    G

    getMilliseconds() - Method in class kp.model.Box
    Gets the milliseconds.
    getPrcNum() - Method in class kp.model.Box
    Gets the 'process' number.
    getReceivedBox() - Static method in class kp.receiver.KpReceiver
    Gets the received Box.
    getRecNum() - Method in class kp.model.Box
    Gets the 'receive' number.
    getSndNum() - Method in class kp.model.Box
    Gets the 'send' number.

    K

    kp.model - package kp.model
     
    kp.processor - package kp.processor
     
    kp.receiver - package kp.receiver
     
    kp.sender - package kp.sender
     
    KpProcessor - Class in kp.processor
    The processor class using the Function interface.
    KpProcessor() - Constructor for class kp.processor.KpProcessor
     
    KpReceiver - Class in kp.receiver
    The receiver class using the Consumer interface.
    KpReceiver() - Constructor for class kp.receiver.KpReceiver
     
    KpSender - Class in kp.sender
    The sender class using the Supplier interface.
    KpSender() - Constructor for class kp.sender.KpSender
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class kp.processor.Application
    The primary entry point for launching the application.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class kp.receiver.Application
    The primary entry point for launching the application.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class kp.sender.Application
    The primary entry point for launching the application.

    P

    processBox() - Method in class kp.processor.KpProcessor
    Creates the Function bean for processing the Box.

    R

    receiveBox() - Method in class kp.receiver.KpReceiver
    Creates the Consumer bean for receiving the Box.

    S

    sendBox() - Method in class kp.sender.KpSender
    Creates the Supplier bean for sending the Box.
    setMilliseconds(long) - Method in class kp.model.Box
    Sets the milliseconds.
    setPrcNum(int) - Method in class kp.model.Box
    Sets the 'process' number.
    setReceivedBox(Box) - Static method in class kp.receiver.KpReceiver
    Sets the received Box.
    setRecNum(int) - Method in class kp.model.Box
    Sets the 'receive' number.
    setSndNum(int) - Method in class kp.model.Box
    Sets the 'send' number.
